mapper.select: SELECT * FROM quiz WHERE quiz_id != COALESCE( (SELECT quiz_id FROM quiz_attempt WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY quiz_attempt_attempted_at DESC LIMIT 1), 0 ) ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_attempt WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND quiz_attempt_date = CURDATE()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_attempt (quiz_id, member_id, quiz_attempt_check, quiz_attempt_date) VALUES (#{quizId}, #{memberId}, #{quizAttemptCheck}, CURDATE())
